name: IdsEdwMbrAccumDLoad

text.value: WITH source_data AS (SELECT MBR_ACCUM_SK, SRC_SYS_CD, MBR_UNIQ_KEY, PROD_ACCUM_ID, MBR_ACCUM_TYP_CD, MBR_ACCUM_NO, MBR_ACCUM_YR_NO, CRT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_DT_SK, LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_DT_SK, GRP_SK, MBR_SK, MBR_ACCUM_AMT, MBR_ACCUM_TYP_DESC, CRT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK, LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK, MBR_ACCUM_TYP_CD_SK, MBR_CAROVR_AMT, MBR_COB_OOP_AMT, PLN_YR_EFF_DT, PLN_YR_END_DT, PROD_ACCUM_DESC FROM @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_edw_staging}.abc123_TMP_IdsEdwMbrAccumDLoad) UPDATE T SET T.SRC_SYS_CD=S.SRC_SYS_CD, T.MBR_UNIQ_KEY=S.MBR_UNIQ_KEY, T.PROD_ACCUM_ID=S.PROD_ACCUM_ID, T.MBR_ACCUM_TYP_CD=S.MBR_ACCUM_TYP_CD, T.MBR_ACCUM_NO=S.MBR_ACCUM_NO, T.MBR_ACCUM_YR_NO=S.MBR_ACCUM_YR_NO, T.LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_DT_SK=S.LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_DT_SK, T.GRP_SK=S.GRP_SK, T.MBR_SK=S.MBR_SK, T.MBR_ACCUM_AMT=S.MBR_ACCUM_AMT, T.MBR_ACCUM_TYP_DESC=S.MBR_ACCUM_TYP_DESC, T.LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK=S.LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK, T.MBR_ACCUM_TYP_CD_SK=S.MBR_ACCUM_TYP_CD_SK, T.MBR_CAROVR_AMT=S.MBR_CAROVR_AMT, T.MBR_COB_OOP_AMT=S.MBR_COB_OOP_AMT, T.PLN_YR_EFF_DT=S.PLN_YR_EFF_DT, T.PLN_YR_END_DT=S.PLN_YR_END_DT, T.PROD_ACCUM_DESC=S.PROD_ACCUM_DESC FROM @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_EDWOwner}.MBR_ACCUM_D T INNER JOIN source_data S ON T.MBR_ACCUM_SK=S.MBR_ACCUM_SK; INSERT INTO @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_EDWOwner}.MBR_ACCUM_D (MBR_ACCUM_SK, SRC_SYS_CD, MBR_UNIQ_KEY, PROD_ACCUM_ID, MBR_ACCUM_TYP_CD, MBR_ACCUM_NO, MBR_ACCUM_YR_NO, CRT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_DT_SK, LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_DT_SK, GRP_SK, MBR_SK, MBR_ACCUM_AMT, MBR_ACCUM_TYP_DESC, CRT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK, LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK, MBR_ACCUM_TYP_CD_SK, MBR_CAROVR_AMT, MBR_COB_OOP_AMT, PLN_YR_EFF_DT, PLN_YR_END_DT, PROD_ACCUM_DESC) SELECT S.MBR_ACCUM_SK, S.SRC_SYS_CD, S.MBR_UNIQ_KEY, S.PROD_ACCUM_ID, S.MBR_ACCUM_TYP_CD, S.MBR_ACCUM_NO, S.MBR_ACCUM_YR_NO, S.CRT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_DT_SK, S.LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_DT_SK, S.GRP_SK, S.MBR_SK, S.MBR_ACCUM_AMT, S.MBR_ACCUM_TYP_DESC, S.CRT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK, S.LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK, S.MBR_ACCUM_TYP_CD_SK, S.MBR_CAROVR_AMT, S.MBR_COB_OOP_AMT, S.PLN_YR_EFF_DT, S.PLN_YR_END_DT, S.PROD_ACCUM_DESC FROM source_data S LEFT JOIN @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_EDWOwner}.MBR_ACCUM_D T ON T.MBR_ACCUM_SK=S.MBR_ACCUM_SK WHERE T.MBR_ACCUM_SK IS NULL
